build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run prepare:tauri-memory-plugin && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost https://tauri.localhost https://api.github.com; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' data: blob:
